## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/001-...`, `chore/...`, or `docs/...`
- [ ] PR is limited to one logical task slice
- [ ] `specs/001-insurance-broker-ikms/tasks.md` reflects completed tasks
- [ ] `docs/11-handoff/ai-handoff.md` is updated
- [ ] Current daily worklog in `docs/13-worklog/` is updated
- [ ] Tests and checks relevant to the slice were run or intentionally skipped
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included
- [ ] Reviewer can evaluate the diff without loading the whole repo
